channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Morgan Wallen’s U.S. Bank Stadium Setlist: Every Song From Opening Night of His Still The Problem Tour in Minneapolis
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to our podcast, where we dive into the latest news in music. I'm your host, and today we're talking about country superstar Morgan Wallen.
Last week, Wallen performed an intimate show at the 4,000-capacity Pinnacle in Nashville to launch his SiriusXM radio station. But just eight days later, he was playing in front of a massive crowd of 70,000 fans at the U.S. Bank Stadium in Minneapolis, as part of his Still The Problem tour.
[Short music transition]
Host: The Still The Problem tour, which kicked off on April 10, is a huge outing with 12 cities and two-night stops in most of them. Wallen has a vast catalog to draw from, with his last two albums, "One Thing At A Time" and "I'm The Problem", featuring 36 and 37 tracks respectively.
[Short music transition]
Host: The Minneapolis show lasted around 2 hours and 15 minutes, with Wallen performing 28 songs. However, there were some notable absences, including his Billboard Hot 100 No. 1 hit "What I Want". But with a rotating lineup of openers, including Ella Langley, Brooks & Dunn, and HARDY, we might see some changes to the setlist in future shows.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's all for today. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next episode.
